name: io.github.bch1212/agentfetch
description: Token-budgeted web fetch for AI agents — auto-routes Jina, FireCrawl, Trafilatura, PDF.

environmentVariables.name: JINA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Jina Reader API key. Free tier ~1M tokens/mo at jina.ai/reader.

environmentVariables.name: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: FireCrawl API key for JS pages. 500 free credits at firecrawl.dev. Optional.

environmentVariables.name: REDIS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Redis connection URL for response caching. Optional.
